docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,815.00 FILED BY TATR LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LECHUGA, SOFIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED JAN-27-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LECHUGA, SOFIA
REMARK:RECEIVED EXHIBITS VIA MAIL FROM PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF TART LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AARON LONDON (MANAGING MEMBER/CEO) VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SOFIA LECHUGA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MATTHEW RUSSO (MANAGER). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: MAR-02-2023] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATR LLC
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR - SC-109 [AARON LONDON APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF, TATR LLC];HEARING:MAR-02-2023 @ 8:30AM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATR LLC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: MAR-02-23 AT 8:30AM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATR LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING: 03/02/2023 AT 8:30AM]

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATR LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LECHUGA, SOFIA $1,815.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
